'''Vandolae''' was a [[Shi'ido]] and a [[Senior Anthropologist]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], employed at a university on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He went on an undercover anthropological study on [[Centares/Legends|Centares]], exploring fringe spacer life in the guise of a spacer named [[Pyrron Nox]], who had given him transport to the world. He was encountered by two friends of the real Pyrron, [[Gideon (spacer)|Gideon]] and [[Keeta]]. Unfortunately, after telling them stories about various [[Changeling/Legends|shapeshifters]], which they had indicated a prejudice against, he made a series of small errors revealing himself to be a shapeshifter himself. Vandolae attempted to use his Shi'ido psionic abilities to erase Gideon's memory, but the spacer's trigger finger was faster, and Vandolae was shot dead.<ref name="SS" />

Ironically, Imperial anthropologist [[Obo Rin]] had been seeking Vandolae for information on the Shi'ido, for use in a report to [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Vontenn]] regarding shapeshifting species. Rin learned Vandolae had been killed shortly thereafter, and found that fact to be indicative of the fact that shapeshifters abilities were limited.<ref name="SS" />
